system.name: example_security_observability_program
system.description: Logical boundary for a sample customer-managed cloud security program: production workloads, shared security services (inventory, vulnerability scanning, centralized logging, alerting, ticketing), and the correlation outputs produced by this assessment agent.
system.notes: Physical facilities and hypervisor layers are inherited per the provider shared-responsibility model; this boundary asserts only customer-configurable and customer-observable controls.

included: Customer-managed production accounts and workloads under change control
Security operations evidence: inventory, scanner exports, SIEM paths, tickets
excluded: Cloud provider proprietary hardware and firmware outside customer configuration
Non-production sandboxes unless explicitly listed in included_components
authorization_scope.boundary_rationale: The assessment targets demonstrable observability for in-scope production components. Inherited provider controls are acknowledged but not re-tested here beyond customer evidence hooks.

system_boundary.description: Logical boundary for a sample customer-managed cloud security program: production workloads, shared security services (inventory, vulnerability scanning, centralized logging, alerting, ticketing), and the correlation outputs produced by this assessment agent.
system_boundary.notes: Physical facilities and hypervisor layers are inherited per the provider shared-responsibility model; this boundary asserts only customer-configurable and customer-observable controls.

excluded_components.name: Physical data centers
excluded_components.rationale: Inherited from cloud service provider; not customer-configurable.

excluded_components.name: Provider-managed network edge
excluded_components.rationale: Outside customer administrative boundary; evidence limited to customer plane configuration.

out_of_scope.rationale: Inherited from cloud service provider; not customer-configurable.
Outside customer administrative boundary; evidence limited to customer plane configuration.

sources.name: Cloud asset discovery inventory
limitations: Scope limited to connected cloud accounts and API permissions at collection time.

sources.name: Declared authoritative system inventory
limitations: Manual CMDB extracts may lag live discovery until reconciliation job runs.

sources.name: Vulnerability scanner target configuration export
limitations: Reflects scanner configuration at export time only.

sources.name: Vulnerability scan findings export
limitations: Plugin coverage depends on scanner feed currency.

sources.name: Central log source coverage and freshness export
limitations: Index retention and RBAC may limit assessor query scope.

sources.name: SIEM detection and alert rule export
limitations: Rule JSON may omit historical disabled rules unless archive is included.

sources.name: Normalized cloud control plane security events
limitations: Event completeness depends on trail and sink configuration in each region.

sources.name: ITSM change record export
limitations: Ticket payloads vary by ITSM product and custom fields.

sources.name: ITSM security incident export
limitations: May exclude informal channel responses unless formally logged.

sources.name: Plan of Action and Milestones export
limitations: Row semantics depend on agency POA&M template version.

sources.name: Identity provider user directory export
limitations: Directory snapshots exclude transient session-only principals unless separately logged.

sources.name: Privileged group and role membership evidence
limitations: Nested group expansion depends on IdP configuration.

sources.name: MFA enrollment and enforcement status export
limitations: Per-device MFA posture may require supplemental EDR evidence.

sources.name: SCIM / provisioning audit logs
limitations: High volume environments may sample or aggregate logs in SIEM.

sources.name: Backup policy and scope configuration export
limitations: Does not by itself prove successful restore without test records.

sources.name: Backup restore test evidence
limitations: Manual attestations must include scope and outcome for sampled workloads.

sources.name: Third-party and vendor service inventory
limitations: Maturity varies; linkage to SSP inheritance narrative is often manual.

sources.name: Software bill of materials export
limitations: SBOM completeness depends on build pipeline instrumentation.

sources.name: Security and privacy role-based training records
limitations: Completion exports may lag LMS by one billing cycle.

sources.name: Observable Security Agent correlation and evaluation bundle
limitations: Outputs are only as complete as inputs supplied to the assessment engine.

sources.name: AI agent telemetry and governance assessment bundle
limitations: Reflects only agents tool gateways and policies present in the uploaded bundle.

sources.name: AWS IAM credential report
limitations: Report reflects IAM users only; federated-only environments need supplemental IdP evidence.

sources.name: AWS CloudTrail trails and event history
limitations: Organization trail vs account trail gaps must be documented per region.

sources.name: AWS Config recorder and compliance snapshots
limitations: Recorder pause windows create coverage gaps unless noted.

sources.name: Amazon GuardDuty findings export
limitations: Finding volume may require sampling for assessor review packages.

sources.name: AWS Security Hub controls and findings aggregate
limitations: Standards subscriptions and suppressions affect visible posture.

sources.name: Amazon Inspector vulnerability findings
limitations: EC2 vs ECR vs Lambda coverage differs by assessment target type.

sources.name: Amazon S3 bucket inventory and policy evidence
limitations: Large bucket counts may require paginated exports.

sources.name: Amazon RDS configuration and security group evidence
limitations: Read replicas and cross-region DR must be scoped explicitly.

sources.name: AWS Backup vault and job evidence
limitations: Cross-account copy jobs require additional IAM evidence.

sources.name: Amazon VPC and network boundary configuration evidence
limitations: Shared VPC and transit gateway topologies need architecture diagrams.

sources.name: Amazon CloudWatch Logs and metric filters
limitations: Log group retention and subscription filter gaps must be reconciled to central SIEM.

ksi_catalog.title: Centralized identity and account lifecycle management
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that identities and privileged access are provisioned, monitored, and deprovisioned in line with policy, with auditable approval and MFA posture.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Privileged users must be approved through a documented workflow.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Approvals recorded and retrievable for privileged role assignments.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Privileged users must have MFA enforced where required by policy.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: MFA enforcement evidenced for privileged accounts in scope.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Terminated users must not retain active access to in-scope systems.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: No active sessions or credentials for terminated identities.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Break-glass accounts must be documented, monitored, and reviewed.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Break-glass inventory, monitoring coverage, and periodic review artifacts.

ksi_catalog.title: Centralized logging and security monitoring
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that security-relevant events are captured, forwarded to a central platform, protected in transit and at rest, and can drive accountable alerting.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Cloud control plane logs are enabled for in-scope accounts and regions.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Control-plane log sources configured and active.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Logs are centralized to the approved SIEM or log analytics service.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Central ingestion paths documented with recent receipt evidence.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Logs are encrypted and access-controlled per policy.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Encryption and RBAC/retention settings evidenced for log stores.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Security-relevant events are alertable with accountable routing.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Enabled rules with recipients mapped to high-risk semantics.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Local-to-central evidence is available where required for AU reviews.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Sample local and matching central events retrievable for sampled assets.

ksi_catalog.title: Vulnerability and configuration risk management
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate vulnerability scanning scope, timely handling of findings, and exploitation-review discipline for high/critical issues aligned to inventory.

pass_fail_criteria.description: All in-scope assets are covered by an authorized scanner scope.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Scanner targets reconcile to authoritative inventory for in-boundary assets.

pass_fail_criteria.description: High/critical vulnerabilities meet SLA or have an approved exception on record.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: SLA tracking or formal risk acceptance linked to the finding.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Exploitation review is performed for high/critical vulnerabilities.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Log review or ticket verification artifacts tied to qualifying findings.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Scanner scope is system-generated and reconciled to inventory.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Exportable target list with identifiers matching inventory keys.

ksi_catalog.title: Controlled change and release discipline
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that material changes follow approved workflows with security analysis, testing, deployment, and verification evidence linked to records.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Risky changes have traceable tickets or equivalent change records.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Change IDs linked to assets or events under assessment.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Change tickets include SIA, testing, approval, deployment, and verification evidence.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Required CM-3 evidence flags satisfied or compensating artifacts attached.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Deployment evidence links to the approved change record.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Deployment timestamps or automation receipts tied to change ID.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Configuration drift is detectable for critical service classes.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Drift detection sources or periodic attestations on file.

ksi_catalog.title: Authoritative inventory and boundary posture
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that declared inventory reconciles to discovery, includes required attributes, and surfaces duplicate, stale, or rogue assets for resolution.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Discovered assets reconcile with declared authoritative inventory.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: No unresolved rogue production-class assets absent from inventory.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Inventory includes boundary status, owner, component type, and scanner/log requirements.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Required columns populated for in-scope rows sampled by assessor.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Duplicate, stale, or conflicting inventory rows are flagged and tracked.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: IIW/CMDB reconciliation process evidences collision handling.

ksi_catalog.title: Security incident readiness and traceable response
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that suspicious and declared incidents have timelines, accountable actions, notifications, and closure aligned to monitoring signals.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Suspicious events have documented response evidence within policy timelines.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Tickets or IR records with owner, timestamps, and disposition.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Incidents include event timeline, action log, notification, and closure evidence.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Complete IR record set per agency IR plan.

pass_fail_criteria.description: High-risk detections link to accountable tickets or cases.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Correlation from alert to ticket ID for sampled high-risk semantics.

ksi_catalog.title: Backup, recovery, and continuity evidence
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate backups for critical assets, encryption, tested restores, and documented RTO/RPO commitments.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Critical assets have backups meeting policy frequency and retention.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Backup policy excerpts plus scope list for critical assets.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Backups are encrypted and access-controlled.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Encryption and key management references for backup stores.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Restore tests are documented with outcomes.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Test reports or tickets with pass/fail and follow-up actions.

pass_fail_criteria.description: RTO/RPO evidence exists for prioritized workloads.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: BIA or service catalog fields mapping workloads to RTO/RPO.

ksi_catalog.title: Supply chain and third-party dependency transparency
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate vendor and dependency visibility, inheritance mapping for external services, SBOM or equivalent tracking, and oversight of critical suppliers.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Vendor inventory exists for in-scope external services and software.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Register of vendors with service descriptions and data sensitivity.

pass_fail_criteria.description: External services are mapped to authorization boundary and inheritance statements.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: SSP or annex tables linking CSP services to inherited controls.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Dependencies or SBOM artifacts are tracked for critical workloads.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: SBOM storage location and refresh cadence documented.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Critical supplier risks are tracked with mitigation owners.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Risk register entries or POA&M rows for supplier issues.

ksi_catalog.title: AI agent identities are registered, scoped, and monitored
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that every in-scope AI agent has a registered identity, accountable owner and purpose, explicit allowed data/tool scopes, approval-backed privileged actions, and credential posture that does not share secrets with human operators.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Every agent has a registered identity with stable agent_id in telemetry.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: agent_identities.json (or package slice) lists each agent with required attributes.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Every agent has documented owner and purpose fields.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Ownership and purpose recorded per agent identity row.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Every agent has explicit allowed scopes for tools and data.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Allow lists and data scopes are present and enforced in policy checks.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Privileged or high-risk agent actions require recorded approvals.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Approval metadata present on qualifying tool_calls rows.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Agent credentials are not shared with human operators (no shared long-lived secrets).
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Identity and tool_call records show non-human scoped credentials only.

reporting_sections.assessor: AI agent identity and access evidence

ksi_catalog.title: Agent decisions and tool use are logged and reviewable
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that agent tool invocations policy decisions approvals memory or context access and high-risk behaviors are logged centrally and reviewable with accountable alerting where required.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Tool calls are logged with agent identity raw_ref and policy decision fields.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: tool_calls[] entries are complete for replay.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Policy decisions for agent actions are logged and attributable.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: policy_decision captured on tool_calls or companion audit stream.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Approval decisions for gated actions are logged.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: approval_required rows include status and approver reference when executed.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Memory and external context access events are logged and labeled.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: memory_events[] with classification for sensitive writes.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Alerts exist for high-risk agent behavior semantics per SOC policy.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Mapped SIEM rules or tickets for agent high-risk semantics.

reporting_sections.assessor: AI agent logging and monitoring evidence

ksi_catalog.title: Agentic misuse is detectable and actionable
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate detection and response for prompt injection unauthorized tool use compromised-agent hypotheses with threat-hunt timelines and containment guidance documented.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Prompt injection or adversarial prompt detections are tracked with evidence.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Detections or policy_violations rows cite injection-class events.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Unauthorized tool use creates a security finding and accountable ticket path.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Violations linked to tickets or IR cases where required.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Compromised-agent hypotheses produce a documented threat-hunt timeline.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Threat hunt output references agent_id and hypothesis identifiers.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Containment guidance exists for high-severity agent incidents.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Runbook or IR plan excerpt covering agent isolation and credential rotation.

ksi_catalog.title: Agent tools and permissions are governed as system changes
ksi_catalog.objective: Demonstrate that new tools permission changes prompts and policies are versioned approved and backed by review evidence consistent with CM and SA families.

pass_fail_criteria.description: New or expanded agent tools require documented approval before production use.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Tool registration or change record ties tool_name to approver evidence.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Tool permission changes are ticketed and traceable.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: CM-3 style linkage between permission deltas and tickets.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Prompts and agent policies are versioned with history.
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Version identifiers or commit refs for prompts/policies in evidence bundle.

pass_fail_criteria.description: Material policy changes include review evidence (peer or CAB).
pass_fail_criteria.expected_result: Reviewer sign-off or ticket attachment for policy change window.
